ksa_text: Knowledge of data subject rights fulfillment and management, including rights request intake procedures, response workflows, compliance timelines, documentation standards, and remediation processes for access, deletion, and rectification requests.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of information technology (IT) risk management policies, requirements, and procedures.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA SP-K-004 (SP, Knowledge) does not clear the weak fit inclusion threshold of 0.52. Composite score 0.4524 is insufficient to establish relevance to market research, survey analysis, and consumer insights at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (eu_ai_act=0.452, nice=0.419, dcwf=0.417) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude upheld. Score 0.4524 below threshold for weak fit domain; no rescuing analytics text signals. No internal inconsistencies identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does SP-domain KSA SP-K-004 (composite 0.4524) appear in published data analyst or BI role profiles?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: SP domain content (AI governance, security/privacy, risk management, compliance) is not a primary expectation in IC-to-senior-IC ANL roles per NIST CSF, ISO 27001; security competencies in IC ANL scope limited to data access controls awareness, not security architecture. Composite 0.4524 confirms weak signal. Exclusion consistent with published ANL frameworks.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 exclude upheld. External evidence confirms SP domain KSA at composite 0.4524 is not a standard requirement for Market Research Analyst at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Pipeline consensus: exclude. P2 exclude confirmed by P3 (internal) and P4 (external) adversarial agents. Zero overturns. Composite 0.4524, domain SP, scope weak fit. High confidence.
